text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Navigator Programs * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Drug Use Disorder Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Homelessness Issues Native American Community Pregnant Individuals AIDS/HIV Issues Pregnant Individuals Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FOSTERCLUB FOSTER YOUTH RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects teens and young adults in and from foster care to resources, people, and organizations that can support basic needs. This includes applying for Medicaid, SNAP, and other services. Please visit www.fosterclub.com/helphub. 620 S Holladay Drive #1 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Current or former foster youth Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 717-1552 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FOSTERCLUB FOSTER YOUTH RESOURCES
